reasoning_content:
The user wants the layout of the provided document image extracted into a JSON object containing bounding box coordinates.

1.  **Identify the main sections:**
    *   Header: Logo, Title, Series info, Page number.
    *   Section Title: "TESTS AND REQUIREMENTS"
    *   Table Caption: "Table 4 Test condition, procedure and requirements"
    *   Table Headers: TEST, TEST METHOD, PROCEDURE, REQUIREMENTS.
    *   Table Rows: Multiple rows containing test details.
    *   Footer: Date, Version, Website.

2.  **Process Header:**
    *   Logo "YAGEO": Top left.
    *   Title "Chip Resistor Surface Mount": Top center-left.
    *   Series info "RC SERIES 0805 (Pb Free)": Top center.
    *   Page info "Product specification 7 10": Top right.

3.  **Process Section Title:**
    *   "TESTS AND REQUIREMENTS": Underlined, bold.

4.  **Process Table Caption:**
    *   "Table 4 Test condition, procedure and requirements": Just below the section title.

5.  **Process Table Headers:**
    *   "TEST": Left column.
    *   "TEST METHOD": Second column.
    *   "PROCEDURE": Third column.
    *   "REQUIREMENTS": Right column.

6.  **Process Table Rows (Iterative extraction):**
    *   **Row 1 (Temperature Coefficient...):**
        *   Col 1: "Temperature Coefficient of Resistance (T.C.R.)"
        *   Col 2: "MIL-STD-202F-method 304; JIS C 5202-4.8"
        *   Col 3: "At +25/-55 °C and +25/+125 °C", Formula block, "Where" block.
        *   Col 4: "Refer to table 3"
    *   **Row 2 (Thermal Shock):**
        *   Col 1: "Thermal Shock"
        *   Col 2: "MIL-STD-202F-method 107G; IEC 60115-1 4.19"
        *   Col 3: "At -65 (+0/-10) °C for 2 minutes and at +155 (+10/-0) °C for 2 minutes; 25 cycles"
        *   Col 4: "±(0.5%+0.05 Ω) for 1% tol.", "±(1.0%+0.05 Ω) for 5% tol."
    *   **Row 3 (Low Temperature Operation):**
        *   Col 1: "Low Temperature Operation"
        *   Col 2: "MIL-R-55342D-Para 4.7.4"
        *   Col 3: "At -65 (+0/-5) °C for 1 hour; RCWV applied for 45 (+5/-0) minutes"
        *   Col 4: "±(0.5%+0.05 Ω) for 1% tol.", "±(1.0%+0.05 Ω) for 5% tol.", "No visible damage"
    *   **Row 4 (Short Time Overload):**
        *   Col 1: "Short Time Overload"
        *   Col 2: "MIL-R-55342D-Para 4.7.5; IEC 60115-1 4.13"
        *   Col 3: "2.5 × RCWV applied for 5 seconds at room temperature"
        *   Col 4: "±(1.0%+0.05 Ω) for 1% tol.", "±(2.0%+0.05 Ω) for 5% tol.", "No visible damage"
    *   **Row 5 (Insulation Resistance):**
        *   Col 1: "Insulation Resistance"
        *   Col 2: "MIL-STD-202F-method 302; IEC 60115-1 4.6.1.1"
        *   Col 3: "RCOV for 1 minute", "Type RC0805", "Voltage (DC) 300 V"
        *   Col 4: "≥10 GΩ"
    *   **Row 6 (Dielectric Withstand Voltage):**
        *   Col 1: "Dielectric Withstand Voltage"
        *   Col 2: "MIL-STD-202F-method 301; IEC 60115-1 4.6.1.1"
        *   Col 3: "Maximun voltage (Vrms) applied for 1 minute", "Type RC0805", "Voltage (AC) 300 Vrms"
        *   Col 4: "No breakdown or flashover"
    *   **Row 7 (Resistance to Soldering Heat):**
        *   Col 1: "Resistance to Soldering Heat"
        *   Col 2: "MIL-STD-202F-method 210C; IEC 60115-1 4.18"
        *   Col 3: "Unmounted chips; 260 ±5 °C for 10 ±1 seconds"
        *   Col 4: "±(0.5%+0.05 Ω) for 1% tol.", "±(1.0%+0.05 Ω) for 5% tol.", "No visible damage"
    *   **Row 8 (Life):**
        *   Col 1: "Life"
        *   Col 2: "MIL-STD-202F-method 108A; IEC 60115-1 4.25.1"
        *   Col 3: "At 70±2 °C for 1,000 hours; RCWV applied for 1.5 hours on and 0.5 hour off"
        *   Col 4: "±(1%+0.05 Ω) for 1% tol.", "±(3%+0.05 Ω) for 5% tol."

7.  **Process Footer:**
    *   Date/Version: "Sep 03, 2004 V.2"
    *   Website: "www.yageo.com"

8.  **Construct JSON:** Assemble all identified elements with their respective coordinates.
